hero.title: Questions and answers for tech interviews —
hero.subtitle: interks brings curated Q&A for interns through seniors: frontend, backend, and more. Practice with structure, learn faster, and walk into interviews with confidence.
hero.footnote: Built for developers who prefer clarity over noise.

features.title: Everything you need to prepare
features.subtitle: A focused workspace for technical interview learning — not scattered blog posts and outdated threads.

hub.title: Single source of truth
hub.body: Pull interview-style questions and clear answers into one flow so you stop jumping between tabs.

levels.title: Level-aware paths
levels.body: From intern to senior: content tagged by depth so you study what matches your stage.

roles.title: Role-based tracks
roles.body: Frontend, backend, and broader software paths — pick a track and stay consistent.

patterns.title: Patterns you will reuse
patterns.body: Focus on explanations that transfer: data structures, APIs, system basics, and how to talk through them.

levels.title: Grow with your career stage
levels.subtitle: Whether you are starting out or leading systems, interks meets you where you are.

intern.title: Intern
intern.body: Foundations, first interviews, and how to communicate what you have built.

junior.title: Junior
junior.body: Solidify core CS, debugging, and day-to-day shipping in team settings.

mid.title: Mid
mid.body: Ownership, trade-offs, performance, and clearer architectural thinking.

senior.title: Senior
senior.body: Leadership signals, complex design, mentoring narratives, and stakeholder alignment.

tracks.title: Tracks that mirror real roles
tracks.subtitle: Choose a lane — you can switch anytime as your path evolves.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.body: UI engineering, performance, accessibility, state, and framework-agnostic concepts.

backend.title: Backend
backend.body: Services, databases, scaling basics, reliability, and pragmatic API design.

fullstack.title: Full-stack
fullstack.body: End-to-end thinking: from client constraints to data and deployment trade-offs.

software.title: Software engineer
software.body: Generalist interview loops with strong CS fundamentals and problem-solving habits.

how.title: How interks fits your week
how.subtitle: Short sessions, steady progress — no cramming required.

step1.title: Pick level and track
step1.body: Tell interks where you are and what role you are targeting.

step2.title: Practice with structured Q&A
step2.body: Work through questions with answers that explain the why — not just the what.

step3.title: Review and retain
step3.body: Revisit weak spots, connect patterns, and build interview muscle memory.

cta.title: Ready to prepare with intention?
cta.subtitle: Leave your email — we will let you know when interks opens. No spam; unsubscribe anytime.
cta.thanks: You're on the list — we'll be in touch.
cta.note: This landing page is a preview. Product access is coming soon.

footer.tagline: interks — interview Q&A for developers, thoughtfully organized.
